_doc: Faithful-replay fixtures captured from a real RegressionTextCheck faulted job (Compare Text UnauthorizedAccessException writing its HTML differences report to a non-writable OutputFilePath 'C:\Windows\System32'). Scrubbed: host UIP-PW06WJSK -> MOCK-HOST, UIPATH\DAN.MOROSANU -> UIPATH\REPLACEMENT_USER, owner email -> original_email@test.com. Job key, folder key, error text + stack, OrchestratorUserIdentity newrobot, timestamps, ids kept verbatim.

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key defb8e05-e36b-4c36-bf11-0b4d08ce6cd1 --state Faulted --output json

rules._doc: Generic jobs list falls through to the single-target faulted list (only the RegressionTextCheck job is in scope for this scenario).
Proxy open-ended docsai queries to the real uip CLI; cache results in _cache/.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback for unmatched commands. Both trace forms (a bare 'or jobs logs <key>' and 'or traces ...') fall through to [] here; the UnauthorizedAccessException signature is fully carried by 'or jobs get' (Info) and 'or jobs logs ... --level Error' (.NET stack).
